bullets: Serve as the sole full-stack developer architecting a multi-tenant freight forwarding platform to replace the legacy Cargo West system. Personally responsible for all technical decisions from database schema design to tech stack selection across 4 repositories, producing output at approximately 3–4x the industry average for a solo developer.

Championed a unified TypeScript ecosystem (Bun + Express + tRPC + Prisma + Better Auth for the backend; Angular + PrimeNG for the frontend) over a proposed PHP/Laravel stack, consolidating the entire codebase into a single language across 4 repositories (BE SSO, BE APP, FE SSO, FE APP) to maximize async performance and eliminate cross-language friction.

Architected a multi-tenant SSO system with 1 shared authentication database and isolated per-tenant application databases, implementing encrypted credentials, JWT/JWKS authentication, full audit logging, and HTTP-only cookie sessions for XSS-safe auth with zero CSRF token overhead — maintaining architectural consistency across all modules through custom scaffolding tooling that reduced new module build time from days to hours.

Developed reusable, inline "Excel-like" row-editing components that allow operations staff to add and edit multiple rows in a single batch submission, eliminating repetitive modal open/close cycles and streamlining bulk data entry across 6+ entity types in complex multi-layered shipment records.

Engineered a fault-tolerant file upload pipeline with a self-purging temporary directory (1–24 hour lifecycle) and an isolated Multer endpoint. Built a fully automated CI/CD pipeline: backend compiles to a single Bun executable (zero source code exposure) deployed via Docker with health checks; frontend builds are obfuscated and served through Nginx for static delivery.
Re-architected the Core Logistics System by consolidating three legacy modules in the Delivery Order process, reducing database complexity by over 50% and improving performance and maintainability.
Built a new textile production tracking module for 200+ staff; automated conversion of Sales Orders to Production Orders in one click, halving manual entry and calculations.
Designed and implemented sales and quotation modules with pricing compliance and approval workflows to ensure data integrity while supporting flexible business rules.

Rapidly delivered a stock opname (inventory audit) system with web and mobile apps in under a week, from database design to deployment, ensuring full synchronization between physical inventory and the database.
Architected and launched two web applications: a 4-step online ad booking system and a 3-step e-newspaper sales platform with QR payment.
Moved manual phone-based workflows online for the first time and integrated 10 payment methods for ad booking and e-newspaper purchases.
Managed servers and databases, executed a complete website migration with zero user disruption, and secured 100% data recovery with regular backups for two websites.
Improved the main website workflow by about 25% through analysis and optimization, followed by one month of monitoring for uptime and reliability.
